validation.description: true for revenue categories, false for expense

computed_fields.BudgetEntry.variance: budgeted_amount - actual_amount (positive = under budget, negative = over)
computed_fields.Budget.total_budgeted: SUM(budget_categories.total_budgeted WHERE budget_id = id AND is_revenue = false)
computed_fields.Budget.total_spent: SUM(budget_categories.total_spent WHERE budget_id = id AND is_revenue = false)

domain_rules.rule: Budget entries must belong to categories of the same budget
domain_rules.api_guard: validate that budget_entry.budget_id matches budget_entry.category.budget_id on create/update
domain_rules.ui_behavior: category selector filters only categories belonging to the current budget
domain_rules.db_constraint: FK budget_entries.category_id -> budget_categories(id) combined with budget_id match check via trigger

domain_rules.rule: Active budget's entries are read-only after period has passed
domain_rules.api_guard: reject PATCH on budget_entry if budget.status = 'active' AND budget_entry.period_end < CURRENT_DATE
domain_rules.ui_behavior: disable budgeted_amount input for past periods; show lock icon with tooltip

domain_rules.rule: Only one active budget per fiscal_year per org
domain_rules.api_guard: check for existing active budget with same fiscal_year and org_id before activating
domain_rules.ui_behavior: show warning if attempting to activate when another active budget exists for same year
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX budgets_org_fiscal_year_active_unique ON budgets(org_id, fiscal_year) WHERE status = 'active'

domain_rules.rule: Sync-actuals only available for active budgets
domain_rules.ui_behavior: hide sync button on non-active budgets

domain_rules.rule: Alert thresholds must be between 1 and 200
domain_rules.api_guard: Zod validation: threshold_pct must be in [1, 200]
domain_rules.db_constraint: ALTER TABLE budget_alerts ADD CONSTRAINT budget_alerts_threshold_pct_check CHECK (threshold_pct >= 1 AND threshold_pct <= 200)

domain_rules.rule: Budget approval requires at least one category with entries
domain_rules.api_guard: reject POST /budgets/:id/approve if COUNT(budget_entries WHERE budget_id = id) = 0
domain_rules.ui_behavior: disable approve button with tooltip 'Add at least one budget entry before approving'

budgets.description: List budgets with pagination and status filter
Duplicate budget to new fiscal year
Pull actual spend from GL into budget entries

budget_entries.description: Sync actual amounts from GL for entries

flows.name: Create Budget
steps: POST /budgets with name, fiscal_year, period_type, currency
Add categories: POST /budgets/:id/categories, supports parent_category_id for hierarchy
Set budget entries per period: PUT /budgets/:id/entries (bulk upsert with budgeted_amount per category+period)
Configure alerts: POST /budgets/:id/alerts with threshold_pct and notification_recipients
Approve: POST /budgets/:id/approve — status changes to active

flows.name: Track Spending vs Budget
steps: POST /budgets/:id/sync-actuals is called (manually or scheduled)
For each BudgetCategory with account_id, query GL journal_lines for linked account in period range
Compute actual_amount per period and update budget_entries.actual_amount
Recompute variance and variance_pct for each entry
For each active BudgetAlert, check if (actual_amount / budgeted_amount * 100) >= threshold_pct
If threshold crossed, update last_triggered_at, emit budget.alert_triggered websocket event, notify recipients

flows.name: Budget vs Actual Dashboard
steps: Fetch active budget entries for current period via GET /budgets/:id/entries
Display BudgetVsActualChart grouped by category
Drill into a category to see period-by-period SpendingPaceChart
BudgetCategoryTree shows live BudgetProgressBar per row

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

patterns.name: write_with_audit
steps: BEGIN
acquire_row_lock
validate_business_rules
write_entity
write_audit_log
COMMIT

patterns.name: bulk_operation
steps: BEGIN
validate_all_records
write_batch
write_audit_log_batch
COMMIT

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id

external_entity_refs.name: RevenueAccount
external_entity_refs.description: GL account code tied to a budget category.
